channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Unknown languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 affaan-m/everything-claude-code (46623 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: affaan-m

📝 Repository: affaan-m/everything-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

⭐ Stelle: 46623

🍴 Forks: 5772

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents anthropic claude claude-code developer-tools llm mcp productivity

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-18T00:51:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T04:20:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 qwibitai/nanoclaw (16654 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: qwibitai

📝 Repository: qwibitai/nanoclaw

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight alternative to Clawdbot / OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK

item.title: 📝 HBAI-Ltd/Toonflow-app (3042 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: HBAI-Ltd

📝 Repository: HBAI-Ltd/Toonflow-app

📄 Descrizione: Toonflow 是一款 AI 短剧漫剧工具，能够利用 AI 技术将小说自动转化为剧本，并结合 AI 生成的图片和视频，实现高效的短剧创作。借助 Toonflow，可以轻松完成从文字到影像的全流程，让短剧制作变得更加智能与便捷。

⭐ Stelle: 3042

🍴 Forks: 370

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-29T10:25:45Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-27T04:09:52Z

👤 Owner: PeonPing

📝 Repository: PeonPing/peon-ping

📄 Descrizione: Warcraft III Peon voice notifications (+ more!) for Claude Code, Codex, IDEs, and any AI agent. Stop babysitting your terminal. Employ a Peon today.

item.description:
👤 Owner: ronitsingh10

📝 Repository: ronitsingh10/FineTune

📄 Descrizione: FineTune, a macOS menu bar app for per-app volume control, multi-device output, audio routing, and 10-band EQ. Free and open-source alternative to SoundSource.

item.description:
👤 Owner: anthropics

📝 Repository: anthropics/claudes-c-compiler

📄 Descrizione: Claude Opus 4.6 wrote a dependency-free C compiler in Rust, with backends targeting x86 (64- and 32-bit), ARM, and RISC-V, capable of compiling a booting Linux kernel.
